summary: Full backend + frontend e2e testing of O Level Quiz bilingual features (iteration 2). All 12 pytest backend tests passed against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend Playwright script verified: home loads with 4 subject cards + mock banner + navbar controls (lang/theme/history/mock); EN/हिं toggle swaps subject names to Devanagari; dark mode adds 'dark' class to <html>; M1 quiz starts, question+options render, mid-quiz quiz-lang-toggle switches to Hindi, Next/Prev/Jump work, submit flow opens confirm modal and lands on results; WhatsApp share calls window.open with https://wa.me/?text=<encoded> containing score; saveAttempt persists to localStorage and appears on /history (reachable via nav-history-btn); history-clear-btn clears via confirm dialog and shows history-empty state.
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar is not rendered on Results page - user cannot toggle language/theme or jump to history directly from Results; they must go Home first (minor UX).
History.jsx uses window.confirm for clear action (browser-native dialog, not themed) - consider a themed modal matching app style.
Results.jsx uses useState({saved:false})[0] as a mount-level flag; works but is a non-idiomatic React pattern - a useRef would be cleaner.
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') - prefer FastAPI lifespan.
No TTL index on quiz_sessions collection in MongoDB - sessions accumulate forever.
seed_data_creation: None - questions are static in questions_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend schema is bilingual: /api/subjects returns name, name_hi, desc, desc_hi; /api/quiz/start/<code> returns questions[{id, q_en, q_hi, options_en, options_hi}] and subject_name_hi; /api/quiz/submit review items have q_en, q_hi, options_en, options_hi, explanation_en, explanation_hi. Frontend testids verified: nav-lang-toggle, nav-theme-toggle, nav-history-btn(-mobile), nav-mock-test-btn(-mobile), home-page, subject-card-{M1..M4}, mock-test-banner, quiz-page, quiz-lang-toggle, quiz-question-text, quiz-option-{0..3}, quiz-next-btn, quiz-prev-btn, quiz-jump-{i}, quiz-submit-btn, quiz-confirm-modal, quiz-confirm-submit, results-page, results-score, results-share-whatsapp-btn, results-home-btn, filter-{all|correct|wrong|skipped}, review-item-{i}, history-page, history-item-{i}, history-empty, history-clear-btn. Dark mode adds 'dark' class on <html>. WhatsApp share triggers window.open to https://wa.me/?text=<encoded message with score>.
